settings.dark_mode_help: Use the dark theme for the hCaptcha widget. Enable this if your forum uses a dark theme.
settings.enable_login_help: Require hCaptcha when users log in. Helps protect against brute-force attacks.

permissions.post_without_hcaptcha: Create posts and discussions without hCaptcha

forum.error: There was an error submitting hCaptcha. Try again.
